WindowsAudioWrapper
Table of Contents

Class AudioFormatProfile

Namespace
WindowsAudioWrapper.Models
Assembly
WindowsAudioWrapper.dll

Represents the default format of the audio stream for a given endpoint.

public sealed class AudioFormatProfile
Inheritance
object
AudioFormatProfile
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Properties

BitsPerSample

Gets or sets the bit depth per sample (e.g., 16, 24, 32).

[JsonProperty("BitDepth")]
public int BitsPerSample { get; set; }

Property Value

int

ChannelMask

Gets or sets the physical speaker destination matrix bitmask layout (e.g., 0x3F for standard 5.1 surround routing).

public uint ChannelMask { get; set; }

Property Value

uint

Channels

Gets or sets the number of audio channels (e.g., 2 for stereo).

public int Channels { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Mode

Gets or sets the mode of the format (Shared or Exclusive). Safely ignored in JSON layout.

[JsonIgnore]
public AudioFormatMode Mode { get; set; }

Property Value

AudioFormatMode

SampleFormat

Gets or sets the underlying data format (e.g., PCM, IEEE Float).

public AudioSampleFormat SampleFormat { get; set; }

Property Value

AudioSampleFormat

SampleRate

Gets or sets the sample rate in Hertz (e.g., 48000).

public int SampleRate { get; set; }

Property Value

int
